title: Your Topic Title
description: Brief description of what this topic covers (1-2 sentences)

concepts.title: Concept Title

sqlServer.description:
Explain the SQL Server approach clearly. Assume the reader is an experienced SQL Server DBA who needs to understand how this works before learning PostgreSQL.

Key points:
• Use bullet points for important features
• Explain WHY things work this way
• Include best practices and gotchas

Provide context that an experienced DBA would appreciate.
notes: Best practices specific to SQL Server

postgres.description:
Explain how PostgreSQL handles this differently or similarly. Focus on helping SQL Server DBAs understand the PostgreSQL perspective.

Key points:
• Highlight what's similar to SQL Server
• Explain what's different and why
• Show PostgreSQL-specific features or advantages

Help the DBA understand not just HOW but WHY PostgreSQL does it this way.
keyDifferences: Main difference #1 between SQL Server and PostgreSQL
notes: Things to watch out for when migrating

concepts.keyDifference: One-sentence summary of the most important difference between SQL Server and PostgreSQL for this concept.
